title: arachniodes macrocarpa
intro: Arachniodes macrocarpa, also known as the giant lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Arachniodes macrocarpa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Arachniodes macrocarpa include teas and infusions, as well as dried extracts that can be used to create tinctures and salves.
